characters.appearance: Stylized 2D male character with brown skin, black hair, and a thick black mustache. He has half-closed eyes and a prominent nose.
characters.wardrobe: Pink shirt with a green collar detail.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: English fluently बोलना चाहते हो? [Want to speak English fluently?]
Character A says: चलो, practice शुरू करते हैं! [Let's start practicing!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by directly addressing their desire to speak fluent English.
- Sets a practical, action-oriented tone by immediately jumping into practice.
- Replaces the original sarcastic challenge with an encouraging invitation.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Want to speak English fluently?
Let's practice!

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Alright, let's start with a simple introduction. [Alright, let's start with a simple introduction.]
Character A says: बहुत बढ़िया! You've got potential. [Very good! You've got potential.]
Character A says: अरे, डरो मत... [Hey, don't be scared...]
Character A says: Mistakes से ही तो सीखते हैं, दोस्त। [We learn from mistakes only, my friend.]
Character A says: Take a deep breath, फिर से try करो। [Take a deep breath, try again.]
Character A says: Perfect! See, you can do it! [Perfect! See, you can do it!]
Character A says: Supernova app पर AI tutor के साथ रोज़ practice करो! [Practice daily with the AI tutor on the Supernova app!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates the app's interactive nature through encouraging feedback rather than sarcastic commentary.
- Normalizes making mistakes, reinforcing Supernova's safe, non-judgmental learning environment.
- Introduces the core feature (AI tutor) as the solution for daily practice.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Speak now
CONTINUE
Nicely done!
TRY AGAIN
Don't worry, try again
Alright, let's start with a simple introduction.
बहुत बढ़िया! You've got potential.
अरे, डरो मत...
Mistakes से ही तो सीखते हैं, दोस्त।
Take a deep breath, फिर से try करो।
Perfect! See, you can do it!
Supernova app पर AI tutor के साथ रोज़ practice करो!

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: आज ही download करो और confidence के साथ English बोलो। [Download today and speak English with confidence.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers a clear, empowering Call to Action.
- Focuses on the emotional payoff: speaking English with confidence.
- Displays the Supernova brand logo.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Download today and speak English with confidence.
Supernova
